2026-04-08T17:39:32.6788870Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T17:39:32.6792340Z 
2026-04-08T17:39:32.6792574Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:39:32.6792939Z
